demoSaves.early.name: Early Ludus
demoSaves.early.description: A small early-game ludus with all core buildings at level 1 and three beginner gladiators.
demoSaves.mid.name: Mid Ludus
demoSaves.mid.description: A mid-game ludus with buildings around level 3 or 4 and four experienced gladiators.
demoSaves.advanced.name: Advanced Ludus
demoSaves.advanced.description: An advanced ludus with level 8 buildings and eight gladiators on Saturday night, just before the Sunday arena phase.

improvements.betterKitchen.name: Better kitchen
improvements.betterKitchen.description: Improves meal preparation and satiety recovery.
improvements.proteinRations.name: Protein rations
improvements.proteinRations.description: Adds strength-focused food for assigned gladiators.
improvements.grainStorage.name: Grain storage
improvements.grainStorage.description: Keeps emergency food reserves for the whole ludus.
improvements.strawBeds.name: Straw beds
improvements.woodenBeds.name: Wooden beds
improvements.woodenBeds.description: Provides better rest for assigned gladiators.
improvements.quietQuarters.name: Quiet quarters
improvements.quietQuarters.description: Reduces noise and supports morale recovery.
improvements.woodenWeapons.name: Wooden weapons
improvements.woodenWeapons.description: Supports safer drills and combat readiness.
improvements.sparringRing.name: Sparring ring
improvements.advancedDoctoreTools.name: Advanced doctore tools
improvements.advancedDoctoreTools.descri: Improves training control and lowers injury risk.
improvements.gameTables.name: Game tables
improvements.gameTables.description: Gives gladiators simple games for morale recovery.
improvements.musicians.name: Musicians
improvements.musicians.description: Adds music that lifts morale across the ludus.
improvements.privateRooms.name: Private rooms
improvements.privateRooms.description: Creates quieter entertainment spaces before combat.
improvements.cleanBandages.name: Clean bandages
improvements.herbalStock.name: Herbal stock
improvements.herbalStock.description: Adds remedies for broader health recovery.
improvements.surgicalTools.name: Surgical tools
policies.economicalMeals.name: Economical meals
policies.economicalMeals.description: Saves money with basic portions at a morale cost.
policies.balancedMeals.name: Balanced meals
policies.balancedMeals.description: Provides reliable daily food without special focus.
policies.richMeals.name: Rich meals
policies.richMeals.description: Improves satiety and morale with expensive meals.
policies.proteinFocusedMeals.name: Protein-focused meals
policies.proteinFocusedMeals.description: Adds strength-oriented meals for training weeks.
policies.balancedTraining.name: Balanced training
policies.balancedTraining.description: Keeps drills broad and improves readiness.
policies.strengthDoctrine.name: Strength doctrine
policies.agilityDoctrine.name: Agility doctrine
policies.agilityDoctrine.description: Focuses drills on speed and movement.
policies.defensiveDoctrine.name: Defensive doctrine
policies.defensiveDoctrine.description: Focuses drills on guard and survival.
policies.brutalDiscipline.name: Brutal discipline
policies.brutalDiscipline.description: Pushes strength gains at a morale cost.
policies.quietEvenings.name: Quiet evenings
policies.gamesAndSongs.name: Games and songs
policies.gamesAndSongs.description: Spends money on stronger morale recovery.
policies.grandEntertainment.name: Grand entertainment
policies.grandEntertainment.description: Hosts lavish events for the whole ludus.
policies.basicCare.name: Basic care
policies.basicCare.description: Provides simple treatment for assigned gladiators.
policies.preventiveCare.name: Preventive care
policies.preventiveCare.description: Focuses on reducing injury risk across the ludus.
policies.intensiveTreatment.name: Intensive treatment
policies.intensiveTreatment.description: Spends more resources for stronger recovery.
weeklyPlan.title: Weekly plan
weeklyPlan.nextStep: Recruitment, planning and combat will build on this save foundation.
weeklyPlan.noGladiators: Recruit a gladiator to start weekly planning.
weeklyPlan.recommendations.morale: Recover morale before combat pressure rises.
contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.noAvailable: No contract is available this week.
contracts.noActive: No contract has been accepted yet.
contracts.localChampion.title: Local champion
contracts.localChampion.description: Win at least one Sunday fight for a nearby sponsor.
contracts.crowdRevenue.title: Packed stands
contracts.crowdRevenue.description: Earn at least 120 denarii from the Sunday arena purse.
contracts.bronzeSpotlight.title: Bronze spotlight
contracts.bronzeSpotlight.description: Win a Bronze III fight while the minor patrons are watching.
contracts.dangerousRecovery.title: Dangerous recovery
contracts.dangerousRecovery.description: Win with a gladiator who starts the fight at 60 health or below.
contracts.profitableSale.title: Profitable sale
contracts.profitableSale.description: Sell a gladiator for at least 220 denarii before the week ends.
events.title: Events
events.noPending: No event needs a decision right now.
events.trainingRefusal.title: Training refusal
events.trainingRefusal.description: A gladiator pushes back against the planned routine.
events.trainingRefusal.grantRest.label: Grant rest
events.trainingRefusal.strictDrill.label: Strict drill
events.trainingRefusal.strictDrill.conse: Discipline improves strength but hurts morale.
events.patricianVisit.title: Patrician visit
events.patricianVisit.description: A local patron asks for a tour of the ludus.
events.patricianVisit.hostVisit.label: Host visit
events.patricianVisit.hostVisit.conseque: The reception costs money but improves reputation.
events.patricianVisit.keepRoutine.label: Keep routine
events.patricianVisit.keepRoutine.conseq: The ludus stays focused, but the patron feels slighted.
events.medicusOffer.title: Medicus offer
events.medicusOffer.description: A traveling medicus offers extra treatment.
events.medicusOffer.payMedicus.label: Pay medicus
events.medicusOffer.declineTreatment.con: The gladiator loses a little morale.
events.rivalRumors.title: Rival rumors
events.rivalRumors.description: A rival lanista spreads ugly stories in the market.
events.rivalRumors.answerPublicly.label: Answer publicly
events.rivalRumors.answerPublicly.conseq: A public answer costs money but restores reputation.
events.rivalRumors.ignoreRumors.label: Ignore
events.youngPromise.title: Young promise
events.youngPromise.description: A gladiator shows a flash of talent during practice.
events.youngPromise.extraCoaching.label: Extra coaching
events.youngPromise.extraCoaching.conseq: Focused coaching improves agility but costs energy.
events.youngPromise.publicPraise.label: Public praise
events.youngPromise.publicPraise.consequ: Praise boosts morale and a little reputation.
betting.title: Odds
betting.noGladiators: Recruit a gladiator before the bookmakers care.
betting.noOdds: No odds are available right now.
betting.scoutingHidden: Scout to reveal the opponent stats.
